aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Torrance AC Repair due to insufficient conversational content and lack of structured data for AI consumption.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content tailored for AI consumption.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC emergency services and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating detailed HowTo guides and publishing them with proper schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Torrance AC Repair is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Ready HVAC Leads for Torrance AC Repair
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services more visible to AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
